description: Firefox session parser decompresses sessionstore.jsonlz4 (LZ4 block) and emits BrowserEvent per open tab
steps: Add lz4_flex = '0.11' to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml
Add lz4_flex = { workspace = true } to crates/browser-firefox/Cargo.toml [dependencies]
Read file bytes. Verify first 8 bytes == b'mozLz40\0' else return error
Bytes 12+: LZ4 block compressed data — decompress with lz4_flex::block::decompress(&data[12..], uncompressed_size)
Walk: json['windows'] array -> each window['tabs'] array -> each tab['entries'] array (take last entry)
Description: entry title or url. Attrs: url, title
Test factory: compress known JSON with lz4_flex::block::compress(), prepend magic + u32 LE size, write to NamedTempFile
Test: parse_empty_session_returns_empty — windows with empty tabs yields empty vec
Test: parse_session_with_single_tab — attrs[url] correct, ts_ns = lastAccessed * 1_000_000
Test: parse_session_invalid_magic_fails — file with wrong header returns Err
